description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense ring of trees, including both green and purple-flowering varieties. The building features a flat roof with multiple solar panels and large, rectangular windows that allow for ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or concrete, with some wooden panel accents visible. The structure is set within a landscaped area, with the trees forming a natural privacy barrier around the property. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, sustainability, and integration with the surrounding greenery. The bungalow appears to have a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic with a focus on open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and solar panels, surrounded by dense green and purple-flowering trees. The structure features large windows and a minimalist, contemporary design.
description_view_0: The bungalow is partially obscured by trees, with the flat roof and solar panels most visible from above.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showing large windows and the main entrance, framed by dense foliage.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is seen, with more of the flat roof and solar panels exposed, and trees encircling the property.
description_view_3: A side view highlights the length of the building, the window arrangement, and the surrounding ring of trees.
